verse_text: Their drink offering shall be half a hin of wine for each young bull, one-third of a hin for the one ram, and one-fourth of a hin for each male lamb. This is the whole burnt offering for the first of every month throughout the months of each year.

links.context: to (2) the weekly offerings ([[EXO.20:8]]-11; Lv 23:3; [[NUM.28:9]], [[NUM.28:10]]), to (3) the monthly offerings ([[NUM.28:11]]-15), to (4) the yearly offerings ([[EXO.12:1]]-20; 23:15, 16;
